label: Highest Utilization
description: Top-N limits ranked by utilisation percentage with limit bars and breach highlighting.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.5.note: No direct lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.7.note: Empty state: 'No limits data' when sortedLimits.length===0.

1.1.note: reads sortedLimits exclusively from useRiskData() hook.

1.2.note: use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope(); riskLimits filtered by scopeStrategyIds; sortedLimits derived from filtered riskLimits.

1.3.note: org filter changes scopeStrategyIds which filters strategy-level limits.

1.7.note: no reference data in widget file.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Applies to: live ✓, paper ✓, batch ✓. Read-only display widget — no mode-specific behavior needed.

3.2.note: scope.mode read in use-risk-page-data.ts; isBatchMode passed through context (not used by this widget).

3.5.note: Paper mode: same display, sourced from paper account limits.

l3.notes: Human must verify 3.4 (batch indicator visible in layout).

4.1.note: No interactive elements — read-only display widget.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

l4.notes: Human must verify 4.8 (WidgetScroll contains LimitBar rows within widget bounds).

5.1.note: Target strategies: all risk-bearing strategies. Widget is strategy-agnostic — shows top-8 limits sorted by utilization.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex colors. Widget uses only Tailwind semantic classes.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo in widget. No inline deps.

8.1.note: No text-[Npx] in widget file. Error/empty messages use text-xs.

8.2.note: No bracket spacing violations. space-y-2.5 and p-1 are Tailwind scale tokens.

8.3.note: Uses LimitBar shared component, Spinner shared component, WidgetScroll.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt, no bare div onClick, no unlabelled inputs. Fully display-only.

8.5.note: Human: resize test at minW=4, minH=2 required.

mergeCandidate.rationale: Both show limit utilization. Utilization shows top-N sorted view; limits-hierarchy shows full tree. Complementary, not duplicate — keep separate.

relationships.notes: Companion to risk-limits-hierarchy. Shows highest-priority limits at a glance.

dataContract.notes: Sorted slice of riskLimits from useRiskLimits() SWR hook in use-risk-page-data.ts.

coverage.notes: Displays top-8 limits sorted by utilization. Venue/strategy-agnostic.

findings.description: risk-utilization-widget.tsx — empty state was inline conditional inside JSX
findings.fix: Promoted inline empty conditional to proper early return (previous session)
Added hasError -> rose-400 error message guard (previous session)
Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: risk-utilization-widget.tsx:35 — sortedLimits.slice(0, 8) hardcodes 'Top 8' limits. Widget description says 'Top N ranked by utilization' but N is fixed. No user control to see more/fewer.
findings.deferReason: UI control gap; low priority — the widget is a tight overview card. If more detail needed, users scroll to risk-limits-hierarchy.
